data.title: Wolters Kluwer integrates legal content in Germany's Libra AI workspace, following Netherlands launch.
data.description: In Berlin, Wolters Kluwer Legal & Regulatory revealed the integration of its reliable legal content into the Libra by Wolters Kluwer legal AI workspace in Germany. This move follows a recent introduction in the Netherlands. The updated workspace combines Wolters Kluwer’s carefully crafted legal content with Libra’s advanced AI features. This integration aims to offer legal professionals in Germany a cohesive and cutting-edge platform to enhance efficiency and quality.

data.title: California startup Akorn Technology wins UAE FoodTech Challenge, tackling food waste. Named among four global winners from 1,200+ entries at sustainability summit.
data.description: Akorn Technology has been announced as one of the winners of the prestigious UAE FoodTech Challenge, a worldwide contest aimed at recognizing and expanding on the most innovative agricultural technology solutions. The Berkeley-based startup is one among the four global victors celebrated at a prominent sustainability summit, having been chosen from a pool of over 1,200 participants.

data.title: Smartee Denti-Technology's 2025 review showcases 100,000 GS mandibular repositioning cases, global growth, and manufacturing enhancements.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, Smartee Denti-Technology announced the publication of its 2025 annual review. The report highlights a significant year marked by the global implementation of its exclusive mandibular repositioning technology and the establishment of fresh infrastructure in Europe.
